type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Birchcliff began operating this plant 06-2024 and have switched emission quantification SaaS.  Birchcliff is in the second year of the an emission SaaS implementation.   We have reduced the reliance on off product calculators and incorporated more actual data

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Birchcliff began operating this plant 06-2024 and have switched emission quantification SaaS.  Birchcliff is in the second year of the an emission SaaS implementation.   We have reduced the reliance on off product calculators and incorporated more actual data

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Birchcliff has onboarded this facility into a different Emission quantification software, we subsequently found that the NPRI output had used a default gas factor instead of an actual gas composition, also the equipment run time was not accounting for a full year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site
